SEARCH
Package discount

Interface FixedPercentageDiscount

All Known Implementing Classes:
CategoryFixedPercentage, PackFixedPercentage, ProductFixedPercentage
public interface FixedPercentageDiscount
It defines the base Fixed Percentage discount's methods
Version:
1.0
Author:
Ana O.R.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    getPercentage()
    It gets the fixed percentage discount's percentage.
    void
    setPercentage(double newPercentage)
    It allows the manager to change the fixed percentage discount's percentage

  • Method Details

    • getPercentage

      double getPercentage()
      It gets the fixed percentage discount's percentage.
      Returns:
      the fixed percentage discount's percentage

    • setPercentage

      void setPercentage(double newPercentage) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It allows the manager to change the fixed percentage discount's percentage
      Parameters:
      newPercentage - the new percentage
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the percentage wasn't between 0 and 100
